meanings.definition: the excess of revenues over outlays in a given period of time (including depreciation and other non-cash expenses)

examples: he wasted his pay on drink
they saved a quarter of all their earnings

meanings.definition: earn on some commercial or business transaction; earn as salary or wages
examples: How much do you make a month in your new job?
She earns a lot in her new job
this merger brought in lots of money

meanings.definition: acquire or deserve by one's efforts or actions
